name: collectory
description: Local-first collection manager for firearms, ammunition, knives, coins, stamps, and anything else you collect. No servers, no cloud, no telemetry.
author: Collectory

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "COLLECTORY_DATA_DIR=.data-dev nodemon --watch server --ext js,json,sql server/index.js" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.release: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js --publish always
